segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Hello.
segments.zh: 您好。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Do you mind if I ask you some questions about your journey today?
segments.zh: 您介意我问您几个关于今天出行的问题吗？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: We're doing a customer satisfaction survey.
segments.zh: 我们正在做一项顾客满意度调查。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 可以。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I've got about ten minutes before my train home leaves.
segments.zh: 我离回家的火车出发还有大约十分钟。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I'm on a day trip.
segments.zh: 我今天是一日游。

words.def: 一日游；当天往返的旅行

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Great.
segments.zh: 太好了。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So first of all, could you tell me your name?
segments.zh: 首先，能告诉我您的名字吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: It's Sophie Bird.
segments.zh: 我叫索菲·伯德。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And would you mind telling me what you do?
segments.zh: 那您介意告诉我您是做什么工作的吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I'm a journalist.
segments.zh: 我是一名记者。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh really?
segments.zh: 哦真的吗？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That must be interesting.
segments.zh: 那一定很有意思。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: It is.
segments.zh: 确实挺有意思。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So was the reason for your visit here today work?
segments.zh: 那您今天来这里是为了工作吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Actually, it's my day off.
segments.zh: 其实今天是我的休息日。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I came here to do some shopping.
segments.zh: 我来这里是想购物。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh right.
segments.zh: 哦，好的。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: But I do sometimes come here for work.
segments.zh: 不过有时候我也会因为工作来这里。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Now I'd like to ask some questions about your journey today, if that's OK.
segments.zh: 现在我想问几个关于您今天行程的问题，可以吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 可以。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: No problem.
segments.zh: 没问题。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Right, so can you tell me which station you're travelling back to?
segments.zh: 好的，那能告诉我您要回哪个车站吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Staunfirth, where I live.
segments.zh: Staunfirth，我住的地方。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Can I just check the spelling?
segments.zh: 我确认一下拼写好吗？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: S-T-A-U-N-F-I-R-T-H?
segments.zh: S-T-A-U-N-F-I-R-T-H？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And you travelled from there this morning?
segments.zh: 那您今天早上就是从那儿过来的？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK, good.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Next, can I ask what kind of ticket you bought?
segments.zh: 接下来，能问一下您买的是什么票吗？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I assume it wasn't a season ticket, as you don't travel every day.
segments.zh: 我猜不是季票，因为您并不是每天都乘车。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 对。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: No, I just got a normal return ticket.
segments.zh: 不是，我只是买了一张普通的往返票。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I don't have a rail card so I didn't get any discount.
segments.zh: 我没有铁路卡，所以没有折扣。

words.def: 铁路卡（购票享折扣的会员卡）

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I keep meaning to get one because it's a lot cheaper.
segments.zh: 我一直想去办一张，因为那样能便宜不少。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Yes – you'd have saved 20% on your ticket today.
segments.zh: 是啊——那样今天您的车票就能省下20%。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So you paid the full price for your ticket?
segments.zh: 那您今天是按全价买的票？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I paid £23.70.
segments.zh: 我付了23.70英镑。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Do you think that's good value for money?
segments.zh: 您觉得这个价钱值吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Not really.
segments.zh: 不太值。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I think it's too much for a journey that only takes 45 minutes.
segments.zh: 我觉得对一趟只要45分钟的旅程来说太贵了。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Yes, that's one of the main complaints we get.
segments.zh: 是的，这也是我们收到的主要抱怨之一。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So, you didn't buy your ticket in advance?
segments.zh: 那您是没有提前买票喽？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: No.
segments.zh: 没有。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I know it's cheaper if you buy a week in advance but I didn't know I was coming then.
segments.zh: 我知道提前一周买票会便宜些，可那时候我还不知道自己要来。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I know.
segments.zh: 我理解。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: You can't always plan ahead.
segments.zh: 确实不是每次都能提前计划好。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So, did you buy it this morning?
segments.zh: 那您是今天早上买的票吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: No, it was yesterday.
segments.zh: 不是，是昨天。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And do you usually buy your tickets at the station?
segments.zh: 那您平常都是在车站买票的吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Well, I do usually but the ticket office closes early and I hate using ticket machines.
segments.zh: 嗯，通常是这样，但售票处关得早，我又讨厌用自动售票机。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I think ticket offices should be open for longer hours.
segments.zh: 我觉得售票处应该延长营业时间。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: There's always a queue for the machines and they're often out of order.
segments.zh: 自动售票机前总是排着队，而且经常出故障。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: A lot of customers are saying the same thing.
segments.zh: 很多顾客都反映了同样的问题。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: So to answer your question ... I got an e-ticket online.
segments.zh: 所以回答您的问题……我这次是在网上买的电子票。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Now I'd like to ask you about your satisfaction with your journey.
segments.zh: 接下来我想问一下您对这次行程的满意度。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So what would you say you were most satisfied with today?
segments.zh: 那今天您最满意的是什么？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Well, I like the wifi on the train.
segments.zh: 嗯，我喜欢火车上的Wi-Fi。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: It's improved a lot.
segments.zh: 它改善了很多。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: It makes it easier for me to work if I want to.
segments.zh: 如果我想工作，也更方便了。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That's the first time today anyone's mentioned that.
segments.zh: 今天您是第一个提到这个的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: It's good to get some positive feedback on that.
segments.zh: 能收到一些正面反馈真好。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Mmm.
segments.zh: 嗯。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And, is there anything you weren't satisfied with?
segments.zh: 那有没有什么让您不满意的？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Well, normally, the trains run on time and are pretty reliable but today there was a delay; the train was about 15 minutes behind schedule.
segments.zh: 平时火车都很准点也很可靠，但今天晚点了；比原定时间大约晚了15分钟。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I'll put that down.
segments.zh: 我记下来。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Now I'd also like to ask about the facilities at this station.
segments.zh: 接下来我想问问您对本站设施的看法。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: You've probably noticed that the whole station's been upgraded.
segments.zh: 您可能已经注意到整个车站升级过了。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: What are you most satisfied with?
segments.zh: 您最满意的是什么？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: I think the best thing is that they've improved the amount of information about train times etc. that's given to passengers – it's much clearer – before there was only one board and I couldn't always see it properly – which was frustrating.
segments.zh: 我觉得最好的是他们改进了给乘客提供的列车时刻等信息的量——比以前清楚多了——以前只有一块告示牌，我经常看不清，令人挺头疼的。

words.def: 令人沮丧的；令人恼火的

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That's good.
segments.zh: 很好。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And is there anything you're not satisfied with?
segments.zh: 那有没有什么您不满意的？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Let's see ... I think things have generally improved a lot.
segments.zh: 让我想想……总体来说改善了很多。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: The trains are much more modern and I like the new café.
segments.zh: 列车现代了不少，我也喜欢新开的咖啡馆。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: But one thing is that there aren't enough places to sit down, especially on the platforms.
segments.zh: 但有一点就是坐的地方不够多，尤其是站台上。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK – so I'll put 'seating' down, shall I, as the thing you're least satisfied with?
segments.zh: 好的——那我就把"座位"记为您最不满意的一项，可以吗？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 可以。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Can I ask your opinion about some of the other facilities?
segments.zh: 我可以问一下您对其它一些设施的看法吗？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: We'd like feedback on whether people are satisfied, dissatisfied or neither satisfied nor dissatisfied.
segments.zh: 我们想了解大家是满意、不满意，还是既不满意也不不满意。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: What about the parking at the station?
segments.zh: 车站的停车怎么样？

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Well to be honest, I don't really have an opinion as I never use it.
segments.zh: 老实说，我没什么看法，因为我从来不用。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So, neither satisfied nor dissatisfied for that then.
segments.zh: 那这一项就是既不满意也不不满意了。

segments.speaker: SOPHIE
segments.en: Yes, I suppose so ...
segments.zh: 是的，我想是吧……

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK, and what about ...?
segments.zh: 好的，那……怎么样？

questions.title: Questions 1–10
instructions: Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

pairs.note: 职业即她说自己是 journalist

paraphrase.explain: 问 Occupation（职业），Sophie 说 I'm a journalist，填 journalist。

items.prompt: Customer details – Reason for travel today

pairs.p: I came here to do some shopping
pairs.note: 来的原因就是购物，即 shopping

paraphrase.explain: 问出行原因，Sophie 说 I came here to do some shopping，填 shopping。

items.prompt: Journey information – Name of station returning to

pairs.note: 她要回的车站就是 Staunfirth（她住的地方）

paraphrase.explain: 问要回的车站名，Sophie 说 Staunfirth, where I live，填 Staunfirth。

items.prompt: Journey information – Type of ticket purchased: standard ______ ticket

pairs.note: standard = normal，票型即 return（往返票）

paraphrase.explain: 问票的类型，Sophie 说 a normal return ticket，填 return。
问车票费用，Sophie 说 I paid £23.70，填 23.70。

items.prompt: Journey information – Where ticket was bought

pairs.note: 买票的地方是网上，即 online

paraphrase.explain: 问在哪里买的票，Sophie 说 I got an e-ticket online，填 online。

items.prompt: Satisfaction with journey – Least satisfied with: the ______ this morning

pairs.note: 最不满意的即今早出现的延误 delay
this morning 对应 today 当天的情况

paraphrase.explain: 问最不满意的方面，Sophie 说 today there was a delay；the train was about 15 minutes behind schedule，填 delay。

items.prompt: Satisfaction with station facilities – Most satisfied with: how much ______ was provided

pairs.note: how much... was provided 对应 the amount of information ... given
provided 与 given to passengers 同义

paraphrase.explain: 问最满意的方面，Sophie 说 they've improved the amount of information ... given to passengers，填 information。

items.prompt: Satisfaction with station facilities – Least satisfied with: lack of seats, particularly on the ______

pairs.p: there aren't enough places to sit down
pairs.note: lack of seats 与 there aren't enough places to sit down 同义
particularly = especially，坐位不够的地方尤指 platforms

paraphrase.explain: 问最不满意的方面，Sophie 说 there aren't enough places to sit down, especially on the platforms，填 platform(s)。

items.prompt: Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied with: the ______ available

pairs.note: 既不满意也不不满意的一项就是车站的 parking

paraphrase.explain: 调查员询问 the parking at the station，Sophie 说没意见，被记为既不满意也不不满意，填 parking。
